g.text: ◆ add queue to worker — backpressure + graceful drain on SIGTERM
lets add the queue to this process
On it. Spawning an agent to map how the worker pulls tasks before I wire in the queue.
Worker hits the DB one row at a time. Wiring a bounded queue with backpressure.
Done. Queue drains with concurrency=4; SIGTERM flushes in-flight tasks.
lets add the queue to this process
No tasks yet. Click + to add.
